LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2000, TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT KJORNES, DAVID M. ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $8,703.71 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,703.71, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED FOR DEFT & PLTF'S ACTION IS DISMISSED. DEFT SHALL RECOVER FROM PLTF REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES & COSTS PURSUANT TO A MEMO OF COSTS AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES.
